title: gitmap version-history --json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap version-history --json`. Top-level is an array of version transition records, each capturing a flatten/unflatten or re-tag event for a tracked repository. Field order is contractual: fromVersionTag, fromVersionNum, toVersionTag, toVersionNum, flattenedPath?, createdAt?, id, repoId.

fromVersionTag.description: Source version tag before the transition (e.g. 'v5.40.0').

fromVersionNum.description: Numeric component of the source version (e.g. 50400 for v5.40.0).

toVersionTag.description: Destination version tag after the transition (e.g. 'v5.41.0').

toVersionNum.description: Numeric component of the destination version (e.g. 50410 for v5.41.0).

flattenedPath.description: Absolute path of the repo after flattening. Omitted when empty.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the transition was recorded. Omitted when empty.

id.description: Primary key of the version-history row.

repoId.description: Foreign key referencing the repo this transition belongs to.
